entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud QM function : COA form printting
entry.content:
Hi @HuijunWang,

Please refer the below SAP help portal link to get the details of steps to configure the Quality Certificate,

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d1e58be39d884a0dbf75a7526a9acbf4/b46eb6531de6b64ce10000000a174cb4.html?q=Certificate%20of%20Analysis

And to create custom Form template, please refer below steps:

  • Install and configure ‘SAP Cloud Print Manager’ application to print the COA Form. Create communication user and Maintain Print Queue in SAP S/4HANA Cloud System. Please refer blog https://blogs.sap.com/2017/08/07/cloud-print-manager-installation-and-configuration/
  • Design your custom COA Form template as per business requirement and bind the fields (supports both standard and custom fields) to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud using ‘Adobe LiveCycle Designer’. It supports to select both the Standard and custom fields as per business requirements and captured in a form. https://help.sap.com/docs/CP_FORMS_BY_ADOBE/6d3eac5a9e3144a7b43932a1078c7628/3537dc5044b8461a9fe26b26aef37c34.html
  • Create New form template in SAP S/4HANA Cloud system using Fiori app ‘Maintain Form Template’ by uploading the template designed in Step 2.
  • Assign the Form Template to the respective Application type in customization configuration.
  • Add output with newly created custom COA form template in the respective Fiori application and assign it to the print queue created in Step1 to print the COA Form.

Please refer the scope item 1LQ (Output Management) to implement business scenarios which include output-related tasks. https://rapid.sap.com/bp/scopeitems/1LQ

To get the API details available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, please refer https://api.sap.com/products/SAPS4HANACloud/apis/all

And for your below query, Embedded SAC is supported in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Thanks and Regards,

Prabha A

entry.title: Re: VAT Report Previews
entry.content:
Hi you should also be activating scope items 1J2. The moment you activate 1J2 you should be able to see the report category and predelivered reports and Reporting entity in setting up statutory repot config id. 

 

For licence part you should always connect with Account executive SAP assigned for your project.

Hello,

I have installed insomnia and the plugin but i cannot see 'Form' tab under the http request

entry.title: Re: Tool Life Monitoring for PRT assigned in routing
entry.content: sap pp S/4HANA Cloud public edition 2408

entry.title: Rating system with forfait including different rating elements
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

my customer has the following requirement for the pricing calculation of his subscriptions:

Usage-based with 2 rating elements: "Driver" and "Vehicle", both can be "active" and "inactive" (this info will be sent by the external system transferring consumption records to subscription billing).
Currently, "Driver" and "Vehicle" are rate elements, while "active" and "inactive" are rate subelements but I can change the configuration if necessary.

- at the end of the month, a forfait of ex. 60€ is billed for a consumption of 1 to 19 units (both "Driver" and "Vehicle", both "active" and "inactive").
- as of the 20th unit, a unit price is applied: 5€/ea for Driver/active and Vehicle/active, 3€ for Driver/inactive and Vehicle/inactive.

Example of consumption (received in Subscription billing in following order as well):

6 Driver/active
6 Driver/inactive
6 Vehicle/active
6 Vehicle/inactive
 total invoice: 60€ (19 units) + (5 Vehicle/inactive*3€) = 60 + 15 = 75 €

do you have any idea/suggestion on how this can be achieved in Subscription billing?

Thank you very much in advance.

Kr,

Elena

entry.title: Re: Use of IT_KEY_TAB input parameter in post
entry.content:
Hi Abdul Waheed,
I understand the use of IT_KEY_TAB in Get methods but in Post method how it works?

Because during post we won't use any filters or we won't pass any key fields in the URL part ryte

For post always we pass data in payload but incase of create stream how can we pass data apart from Slug is the question

Regards,

Prasanna CD

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: week 1 challenge

entry.title: SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) integration with SAP AI Core services: Part 1 - Setup
entry.content:
SAP AI Core is a service in the SAP Business Technology Platform that is designed to handle the execution and operations of your AI assets in a standardized, scalable, and hyperscaler-agnostic way. It provides seamless integration with your SAP solutions. Any AI function can be easily realized using open-source frameworks. SAP AI Core supports full lifecycle management of AI scenarios. Access generative AI capabilities and prompt lifecycle management via the generative AI hub.

The SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) enables developers and technical business users to build multi-channel applications. It allows you to build your application once, in an integrated development environment, and run it natively on mobile devices (Android and iOS) and as a web application (online) in the browser.

In this series of blogs, I will showcase how to integrate SAP AI Core services into SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) to develop mobile applications with AI capabilities.

1. Subscribe SAP AI Core service and create instance

Please refer to SAP tutorials:

Use Boosters for Free Tier Use of SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad

Prompt LLMs in the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core & Launchpad 

for details on how to setup SAP AI Core service and SAP AI Launchpad.

2. Note down the "client-id" and "client-secret" under credentials of your new instance

3. Create new deployment in SAP AI Launchpad and note down the url

4. Configure new destination for SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) Web Client to consume the new AI service deployment

If you want to test and run your app in SAP Business Application Studio (MDK Editor) and deploy it as a web app running on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), you need to configure the BTP destination for your AI service deployment of SAP AI Core services.

an example of destination configuration is as below

#
#Wed Jul 03 03:57:27 UTC 2024
Type=HTTP
clientId=sb-xxxxxxxxx|xsuaa_std\!xxxxx
clientSecret=xxxxxxxxxxxx
HTML5.DynamicDestination=true
Authentication=OAuth2ClientCredentials
URL.headers.AI-Resource-Group=default
Name=AzureOpenAI
tokenServiceURL=https\://test-int.authentication.sap.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token
URL=https\://api.ai.prod.eu-central-1.aws.ml.hana.ondemand.com/v2/inference/deployments/d123456789c
ProxyType=Internet
tokenServiceURLType=Dedicated
URL.headers.Content-Type=application/json
WebIDEEnabled=true

5. Configure your SAP Mobile Service instance to consume the new AI service deployment

You can create a new mobile service instance or modify your existing instance to add new mobile connectivity for your AI service deployment on SAP AI Core services.

6. Setup your MDK development and testing environment. 

Download and install the SAP Mobile Services Client on your mobile devices, or build your Mobile Development Kit Client using the MDK SDK, and create a new MDK project in Business Application Studio (MDK Editor) as usual.

If you are new to MDK, please check out the following tutorials

Create Your First MDK Application

Build Your Mobile Development Kit Client Using MDK SDK 

After completing the steps mentioned above, our next blog will explore integrating SAP AI Core services into SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) to develop mobile applications with AI capabilities.

entry.title: Re: "Send ERP Delivery Messages" PPF is not executing fro...

entry.title: Re: EWM: Bulk Storage Unblock Putaway

entry.title: Sonar Qube to Github CodeQL migration
entry.content: Hi All, SAP Commerce uses Sonar qube by default for code quality and junit coverage. Does anybody have the steps and challenges faced while migrating from Sonar Qube to Github CodeQL?

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud - Segmentation (LO-SGT) Function Con...
entry.content:
Hi @HuijunWang ,

You can create an MRP area for each subcontractor which simplifies the planning process if you have several subcontractors for same raw material

When planning the component materials with subcontracting MRP areas, the system checks whether the subcontracting requirements can be covered by existing inventory at your subcontractor's or whether you have already sent the parts to be provided to your subcontractor. If current inventory at your subcontractor does not cover the subcontracting requirements, the system creates a stock transfer reservation to transfer the demand from the subcontractor company to your company. You can then produce or procure the material and send it on to your subcontractor.

Thanks,

Prabha A

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
hi,

  Thanks for the response. Please provide a screenshot after adding a value help for Status field and also by searching without a '*' .

entry.title: Re: Record in lookup table data ignored during subscription price calculation - Subscription billing
entry.content:
Hi Elena,

this is correct. Currently there is no wildcard possible in lookup table input fields. 
And as you supposed it is necessary to define less specific lookup tables together with a fallback mechanism. 

For example, if you would like to support customer specific prices and standard list prices, you would define two tables:
1. one for standard list prices with input fields productCode, marketId, rateElement (or reuse the predefined lookup table)
2. the customer specific prices with input fields customerId, productCode, marketId, rateElement.

The pricing tree of the respective price element specification needs then also a fallback logic:
First, a lookup with the customer specific lookup table is done, and if no entry was found then the lookup with the standard list prices is done. 
Like this:

Same principle needs to be applied for your price conditions (or other lookup table data) which are market independant.

Best, 
Carsten

entry.title: Re: Client-secret change in every CAP app deploy
entry.content: This is the designed behavior. Bindings are private to the app. These get refreshed when the app is restaged. The correct approach is to create a key (not use a binding) and use the credentials from the key. The standard (best practice) approach for this is to update the destination configuration together with deployment in mta. This has the advantage of eliminating the manual work in creating this destination. This is the approach in the mta file generated by cds-dk (`cds add mta`).

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Rules 2.0 in Time Management - 2H 2023
entry.content:
Hi

I have a requirement to allow capturing of a sick leave absence record, in hours, on an off day (zero working hours). Scenario above in your blog: Absence counting on non-working days.

I've configured as suggested but it seems to be that this scenario can only handle full days and I need to be able to capture the number of hours against the time type on the scheduled off day. The WSR has time recording variant clocks (so cannot use simple WSR and flexible requesting it seems).

Is there a way to allow an entry to be captured with the actual hours / duration as opposed to one full calendar day being counted?  (ignore the requesting value below it is just 1 hour because of the rule and units of measure on the time type)

 

Any advice is appreciated, thank you, great detailed blog!

Shalene

entry.title: Re: CAP: $count=true returning 0 as the amount although t...
entry.content:
Your implementation has to fill `$count` if this is requested. Currently your implementation only returns data, it does not handle `$count=true` along with many other odata system parameters.

You can return `$count` by setting `tasks.$count = <number>`.

entry.title: Re: Traceability_Scrap quantity in In process Inspection...
entry.content:
Hi @thangarajthomas,

Please check the Fiori app 'Operation Scrap - By Work Center' to compare actual scrap figures recorded in the production confirmations with the expected scrap that was defined in the order operation. It allows you to implement a feedback loop for updating the expected scrap percentage in the order operation. The app shows the work centers where the expected scrap percentage most differs from the actual scrap percentage.

Please refer the Fiori app library to get more details about this app and other details on Business roles required to access the Fiori app - https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2034')/S33

Thanks and Regards,

Prabha A

entry.title: SAPUI5 Framework files outdated
entry.content:
I have updated the UI5 framework from 1.96.12 to 1.96.32.

After transporting to the quality system, some files seem outdated, I think there is a cache issue.

For example, in the date fields, the placeholder is broken:

In the console, we can see that the text isn't found and it was triggered from the line 2592 of DateFormat-dbg.js

However, when I click on it, the file contains only 2424 lines! Therefore, the dbg file is not the same as the original file because some of them are not updated.

Does anyone know how to clear this type of cache, maybe regenerate that timestamp part from the path?

I have tried with the normal cache-clearing programs like /UI2/INVALIDATE_GLOBAL_CACHES, restarting the system, redoing the update manually (so this time without transport) but nothing worked. In the DEV system everything is ok.

Thanks in advance for your help!

I have attached a screenshot of my completed Learning Journey for your reference.

Thank you for your time.

entry.title: eAuction: view remaining time per LOT instead of whole Auction in Ariba Guided Sourcing
entry.content:
When an eAuction has more than 1 lot, from the supplier’s view, the remaining time shows PER LOT (which makes sense, they want to see how much time they have for bidding), but from our perspective (End User), the time displayed is till the end of the whole eAuction in Ariba GS.

This is not what it was in classic Ariba and also this is not useful for us, we need to see how much time is left per lot/line item to be able to react accordingly in case any issues/calls from suppliers come up.

Could anyone of you suggest, how to edit the graph or is there any option available!

If so, what essential skills should an Integration Developer possess to address this scenario in the present?

entry.title: Electronic Invoices for Malaysia: A Guide for Communication Settings in the Cloud Edition
entry.content:
You are in the process of implementing electronic invoices for Malaysia. One of the key implementation activities is to integrate your business system (for example, SAP S/4HANA Cloud) with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition. The cloud edition acts as a bridge between your business system and the Inland Revenue Board of Malaysia (IRBM), the tax authorities in Malaysia. Among other settings, you must configure communication settings in the Manage Communication Settings - External Parties app in the cloud edition to connect to the IRBM. This blog guides you through configuring these communication settings.

Getting Started

Start your journey by reading the following documentation, which describes how to configure communication settings:

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Managing Communication Settings | SAP Help Portal 
  • SAP S/4HANA: Managing Communication Settings | SAP Help Portal
  • SAP ERP: Managing Communication Settings | SAP Help Portal

The communication settings primarily involve maintaining the credentials that you've obtained from the IRBM or another authority, including a pair of client ID and client secret as well as a digital certificate. You should get these credentials ready for use before proceeding to configure communication settings in the cloud edition. You can find out the Malaysia-specific settings from the Process-Specific Settings page:

Product Guide: Process Specific Settings

Step 1: Create a New Communication Type

You need to first retrieve your taxpayer identification number (TIN) as described at How to retrieve and verify company TIN number? and then create a new communication type using this TIN.

Create communication type


Step 2: Add an Authentication Setting for Consuming the IRBM APIs

For the communication type created in step 1, add an authentication setting that is used to consume the IRBM APIs, as follows:

  1. Select the Basic type.
  2. Enter your client ID as the username and your client secret as the password.
    See How to obtain Client ID and Client Secret?.

Add basic authentication type

Step 3: Add an Authentication Setting for Signing Electronic Invoices

For the communication type created in step 1, add another authentication setting that is used to sign electronic invoices, as follows:

  1. Select the Key Pair X.509 type.
  2. Upload the certificate you generated from one of the certified service providers.
  3. Enter the password for your digital certificate.
    You need to purchase a digital certificate from a certificate authority (CA) in Malaysia. See How to acquire Digital Signature?.

Note: SAP supports soft certificates only, roaming certificates are not supported. The digital certificate extensions supported are PFX and P12.

Add Keypair

More Information

Suppose that your company has several company codes representing headquarters and subsidiary units. In this case, you can choose to use only one digital certificate, which is registered with the TIN of headquarters or a leading subsidiary. The TIN associated with the common certificate is referred to as intermediary or intermediary representative. See For companies that have subsidiaries, does digital certificate need to be registered for each subsidiary?.

If you use different SAP systems at the same time, such as SAP ERP and SAP S/4HANA, you can still use the same digital certificate.

Also remember that a digital certificate has an expiration date. You must renew your certificate when it's expiring soon. See Do I need to renew a digital certificate?. Otherwise, you'll encounter the following errors:

  • Certificate is not valid according to the chain of trust validation or has been issued by an untrusted certificate authority.
  • Signing time is not within validity period.

We hope that you find this information useful. Feel free to leave a comment on this blog or follow SAP Document and Reporting Compliance | SAP Community.

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

entry.title: Re: Tcode for Clear PSA Fiori Application
entry.content: Hi Santhosh, as far as I know, there is only this app. But it is also web dynpro based, so you can start it without using Fiori.

entry.title: Re: Tcode for Clear PSA Fiori Application
entry.content: On the other hand, there is no need to use the "Release Reference Document" button in case of Cross-Order Staging components. They are always in the PSA without a reference to the PMR item.

entry.title: Re: How to Download XML Data File of Goods Receipt in S/4...
entry.content:
Hi Bhargav,
Instead of using a post goods receipt app, you can use a post goods movement app to download the XML of the MIGO document. Go to the post-goods movement app, A12 change mode, R02 material document, and enter. Go to the output tab and display output. In the output screen add a new line, and write your form output type, the channel is print, country, language, and form name and double click the line item and enter Print Queue is #&&download_form_data_xml&&#. Display the output.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Screen Personas - Field cannot be moved
entry.content:
As Tamas says there was a note released that focused on this issue.

I have however still found this issue when using the "Design Mode" in RF (CTRL-SHIFT-F2) where you can see all fields on a screen. Some fields (only a few) are not changed if you do changes in Personas in this mode. You have then run the screen normally and move/change those fields..

We still have issues with dumps with RF + Personas Editor and some other things but the bugs have become fewer in each release so do the "health check" regularly!

entry.title: Weighted Average formula for Production Order Creation using BOM or Recipe in SAP PP
entry.content:
Hii Team,

I am at waste management Industries facing issue to Weighting Average for BOM or recipe preparation, We have multiple RM for 1 FG , but before starting production Process, we have to select manual BOM through weighting avg formula of the MIC's which are recorded at the time of GR for incoming material.

 

Currently, there is customized T-Code for the process.

 

But we want to process it in SAP Best Practice or in SAP standard way.

 

Please suggest process which includes same.

 

Your suggestion will be highly appreciated.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: can we count direct reports by business rules ?
entry.content: You can try to implement this in integration center providing the number into the MDF portlet and an onsave rule checking if one of the directs has a different company. I am a bit unsure if the business rule can check the "array" of directs. Because according to your description as long as one user has a different company you can set one field to true instead of adding the number of directs

entry.title: Re: Aggregation of rate elements with rate subelements Su...
entry.content:
Hi Elena,

a) In order to configure an output column in a lookup table, you will need a field defined in the field catalog. You can choose to create a new one or reuse an existing field. I recommend keeping the number of fields as low as possible through maximum reuse. However, it's important not to reuse a field that has a different business meaning attached to it. Since blocksize represents the size of a block typically used for block pricing of usage (e.g. API calls which are priced in blocks of 1000 calls), it would be best to create a new field called "minimumQuantity" with a proper description.

Then, create a new lookup table with "minimumQuantity" as an output column. You can decide to define it with only the minimumQuantity as output or include both the minimumQuantity and the price condition. The choice between these two approaches depends on factors such as reuse, understandability of the pricing tree, and data maintenance. Typically, I would prefer the single table approach as it allows for the maintenance of the minimum quantity together with the prices.

c) I would recommend leaving the predefined content untouched and creating a new price element specification, for example, by copying the existing UsagePrice (e.g. "UsagePriceMinQuant") and then using this in the pricing scheme instead of "Usage Price".


Best
Carsten

entry.title: Re: Error in Condition Contract Settlement Pricing DIFF Condition types for Rounding off the Gross V

entry.title: Delete logs from table DBTABLOG with report RSTBPDEL
entry.content:
Hi

I have executed this report in background and the job was canceled with a runtime error. 

Job log overview:

```

Internal session terminated with a runtime error COMPUTE_INT_PLUS_OVERFLOW (see ST22)

```

and ST22 shows:
```
The current ABAP program "CL_STAB_DELETE_TABL_CHANGE_LOGCP" had to be
terminated because it found a
statement that could not be executed.
```

I can not find any information about this ABAP program "CL_STAB_DELETE_TABL_CHANGE_LOGCP" in sap notes.

entry.title: Re: ES接口数据创建时间如何更改为用户所在时区
entry.content: 你好，通过接口创建的数据在后台存储的会是UTC时间，在前台展示会根据用户的时区不同展示用户所在时区的时间。

entry.title: Re: Enabling Stories in People Analytics: Transforming Data into Insights
entry.content: Kudos to you Shruti! very crisp

entry.title: Re: Upload Programs in SAP Public Cloud for Custom tables
entry.content: Yes, customer can leverage Custom Business Objects to upload z objects data. you may refer to the below link:

entry.title: Re: Upload Programs in SAP Public Cloud for Custom tables
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/dd7329eabc2846518acbefd801feedc8.html

entry.title: Re: API_BUSINESS_PARTNER
entry.content: 客户可以查看这个链接，包含了具体不同操作的调用方式：https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3c916ef10fc240c9afc594b346ffaf77/85043858ea0f9244e10000000a4450e5.html

entry.title: Re: Delete logs from table DBTABLOG with report RSTBPDEL
entry.content: Please open a ticket with SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: SAM 2310 error message code 500
entry.content: Thanks for the advice. We found an issue between DMS and Inspection lot. Implementing note 3413464 should solve the issue

entry.title: Re: CF190 breakdown details
entry.content: What is CF190 breakdown? What software? What functional domain?

entry.title: Is it possible to use own IdP User for SAP HANA CLOUD DB User?
entry.content:
Hi,

We set up an own IDP and a HANA Cloud DB app +instance on SAP BTP.

SSO is possible for the APP, and it just need the user created on IdP.

But my question is if it is possible to reuse/synchronize this user also as DB User. From what I understand now its only possible with LDAP.

Any tips?

Thanks in advance!

SAP HANA Cloud SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP Cloud Identity Services

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori: How to find out Application Name & Applica...
entry.content:
Finally I got the things, 

The way i find is followed the below the process

01. Firstly i enabled all things in sandbox
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/6d52de87aa0d4fb6a90924720a5b0549/f691242bc626461984f15c9684fe2fa5.html?locale=en-US

02. Then after i find required fiori Apps & APP ID by following this video 
https://youtu.be/TDjs-Bjcfb4?si=SQeQk6Px7flOWpFM

03. Then after in check in fiori app name in library website 
https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/ 

Thanks, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: Why isn't the actual value changing after the O2C process?
Re: Whene can I download the note 142902
entry.content:
Hello @SteveChen 

Use this link https://me.sap.com/notes/142902

You need to log in with authorized S-user.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
ABAP Cloud is the powerful development model for clean core compliant, cloud-ready business applications, services, and extensions.
In this session, we will demonstrate how the 3-tier extensibility model helps you to consume BAPIs with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA.

Speakers : Manikandan Rajasekaran and Vignesh Subramanian

entry.title: Re: VAT Report Previews
entry.content: Both 5XU and 1J2 comes with communication scenarios. Did you enable them?

entry.title: Re: how to import budget with dtw in sap b1
entry.content: Thanks, It worked.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Calculated measure in the model of previous year not working properly
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm facing the issue when I'm trying to create a calculate measure in my planning model. I would like to present an amount of the previous year in all my stories, but also divided properly for quaters and months. This is the formula I wrote:

 

And this is the result:

So as you can see, it returns the amount for the whole year also in quaters and months.

I tried also this formula, but the result is the same:

 

It works properly with restricted measure if I create it in story, so I wonder what can cause the issue and what should I change in my formula to have it working properly??

entry.title: Re: VAT Report Previews
entry.content:
Both 5XU and 1J2 comes with communication scenarios . Make sure you enable them . Refer set up instruction documents for respective countries 

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-055/2022/SolP/1J2?region=AE

entry.title: Re: Writing Blogs, Technical Documentation, and Creating Project Structures
entry.content:
Hi KunalBansal ,

Your passion for writing and its impact on transforming complex ideas is impressive. It's great to see how your content makes a difference in your field.

Regards ,

entry.title: Re: My geekiest hobby is learning and sharing knowledge!
entry.content:
Hi Ruthvik , 

It’s great to hear about your passion for exploring and sharing insights in the SAP ecosystem. Your dedication to helping others through blogs, YouTube, and community sessions is truly impactful.

Regards ,

entry.title: Re: ABAP debugger enhancement or how to speed up your test data creation process
entry.content:
wow! what a relief. Thank you! 
ADT Eclipse does allow this feature but I was looking for it in GUI as well.

Thank you very much for this, sadly I'm sure my client won't allow me to do this in their system.
We deserve this feature built-in.

entry.title: Re: My hobby is studying things about SAP, AI, Machine Learning and Python!
entry.content:
Hi Manuel,

Nice to meet you! It’s impressive to see your extensive experience and involvement with SIT Fortaleza. Your hobbies in ML, AI, and Python sound fascinating. Thanks for sharing the photos and your background!

Best,
Azmath.

entry.title: Re: My Geekiest Hobby: Integration Middleware Enthusiast, Speaker, Blogger, and Community Contributo
entry.content: @ShaikAzmathulla agreed and kudos to your passion as your sessions during SIT are very insightful 🙂

entry.title: Re: Opportunity in SAP-IS Media
entry.content:
Hi,

with all SAP IS media discussions happening  now in 2024 is there some one who can give a future road map for  M/SD and M/AM for s4 hana . msarasamma@yahoo.com

entry.title: I can't update the closedate field with dtw
entry.content: I want to update the "startdate" and "closedate" fields in production orders with dtw. I get the error "Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029)65171" when updating the end date field. How can I update this field?

entry.title: Re: Migrating Workflows to Build Process Automation
entry.content: What is the update released on August 16th you refer to?

entry.title: Batch managed tick at plant level in ERP not flowing to EWM via ALE Idoc
entry.content:
Hello,

We have SAP ERP 6 EHP6 version wherein Batch is set at Plant level.

We are linking SAP EWM Decentralised 2309 version to SAP ERP wherein we have also set Batch at Plant level same as ERP.

We are transferring Batch managed products from ERP to EWM via ALE idoc but Batch managed tick at plant level is not flowing from ERP to EWM.

In EWM, we can see Batch managed indicator set on material master in MM03 but Batch managed indicator is not set in Warehouse product in /SCWM/MAT1.

What can be reason for this and how can we set this?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: CG12 export produce # for some language in the applic...
entry.content:
Hello

these strange characters can show up if you do the export "wrong". 

BUT we know other reasons as well. Some months ago we have realized an issue in "import". For that SAP has provided a fix (i belive character 76 or so was deleted durign the import)

I assume: you use a "UNIX" OS for your SAP system? Please decribe the steps as donw for the export; there is (if i remember correct) as well a "environmental parameter"for export; you must make sure to use "UNICODE" option

C.B.

PS: https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/ehs-import-specifications-phrases-reports-etc-error-code-utf8-2-utf16/qaq-p/619257 could be of interest

entry.title: Re: My Geekiest Hobby: Integration Middleware Enthusiast, Speaker, Blogger, and Community Contributo
entry.content:
Hi Kunal ,

Thank you! I appreciate your kind words and am glad to hear that you find the sessions insightful.

Regards ,

entry.title: Re: Implementation of Barcode/QR Scanner in SAPUI5
entry.content: Hi.. same for me in local run on BAS and after Deployed in Cloud foundry It worked ... open the camera, but don't open it in after configured to FLP tile means SAP Build Work Zone.

entry.title: Date Validation for PO
entry.content:
Hi, 

Client requested for Purchase Order should not allow backdated Entries.

Is there any validation in S4/HANA Cloud Public Edition?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Navigation key Issues for roles and tasks from PPM items
entry.content: Check your PPM Navigation configuration. I found that these two navigations were missing. When I added them my navigation to Task or Roles in PPM Item detail screen works again

entry.title: Re: Date Validation for PO
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

This is not supported in standard scope.

Would you please find BAdI below and add custom logic?

For example you can compare the value of sys-date and PO creation date.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/8676e556cca85267e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: B1iF - Update UDF's not working
entry.content:
I have create a really simple step in the Integrations Framework, which should update two UDF's in a purchase order in company B, if the fields were updateded in a purchase order in company A.

This is the Payload and the result of B1 Object:

<vpf:Payload xmlns:vpf="urn:com.sap.b1i.vplatform:entity" Role="X" id="atom5" ts="2024/08/22 08:28:15">

<OPOR xmlns="">
<row>
<DocEntry>54991</DocEntry>
</row>
</OPOR>
<POR1 xmlns="">
<row>
<LineNum>2</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635101</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>N</U_Labprue>
</row>
<row>
<LineNum>3</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635102</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>Y</U_Labprue>
</row>
<row>
<LineNum>4</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635103</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>N</U_Labprue>
</row>
<row>
<LineNum>5</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635104</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>N</U_Labprue>
</row>
</POR1>
</vpf:Payload>
<Payload Role="C" id="atom4" system="0010000250" status="success" b1login="Technical User" method="Synchronous Update" objectid="22" payload="atom5" keyname="DocEntry" keyvalue="54991" DIresult="success" DImsg=""/>

If does not work correct. It updates the pruchase order in company A, but change no value, as you can see in the change log of the document:

Is something missing in the payload to update a purchase order? Any suggestions why the fields are not updated?

 

Regards

Marco

entry.title: Re: From Monday Blues to Data Delights: My Geeky Hobby :)
entry.content:
Hi bhavinvyas,

That sounds like a great way to unwind! Exploring analytics, improving data models, and sharing insights through blogs and LinkedIn must be both rewarding and fun. It’s impressive how you turn a busy week into something so productive and enjoyable.

Best,
Azmath.

entry.title: Re: MDG DQM derivation for BP role
entry.content:
Hi @MDG,

 

Hard to give you an answer with the provided info; just some hints:

  • Is your derivation scenario approved?
  • Is your rule approved? If not, go in "edit" mode and change its status to "Approved"
  • Is your rule enabled? In the detail screen of your derivation scenario, the "Execution" switch should be green for the desired derivation rule.

 

This guide covers all the steps required to setup a derivation scenario to be used in MDG Central Governance; I'd suggest to use it for your reference.

 

Best,

R.

entry.title: Re: implement a custom application that can scan QR codes...
entry.content: Hi @dennis_koehler .. In local run on BAS and after Deployed in Cloud foundry It worked, open the camera, but don't open it in after configured to FLP tile means SAP Build Work Zone.... I'm getting error like this........... BarcodeScanner.loadZXingCPPInstance: can not load wasm lib instance of ZXingCPP. RuntimeError: Aborted(CompileError: WebAssembly.instantiate(): Refused to compile or instantiate WebAssembly module because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:"). Build with -sASSERTIONS for more info.

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to change warning message to error message
entry.content: Hi Shakeel, I have a similar query. I have added my message F5192 in SSCUI 101923 but it is not working. I am trying to do it with SSCUI 103887 but system is not opening application area F5 and showing error as enter a valid value within the allowed work area.

entry.title: Re: EWM: Bulk Storage Unblock Putaway
entry.content: Thanks for help, it's working.

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM Health Monitoring on-premise CI
entry.content: Hi Paula, Thank you for your reaction. CI mean standalone Central Instance system ASCS. I Health Monitoring is visible only ABAP system of primary instance, but I need monitor some OS KPIs like disk, CPU, system availability of distributed instances like Central Instace etc. Regards Jakub
